title: MalkMod
description: A silly mod I made to learn Minecraft modding. Introduces some items from the game OneShot.
body:
# MalkMod

A very silly Minecraft mod I made to learn Java development and Minecraft modding.

Collect Yellow Phosphor Ore near the nether roof to create items from OneShot!

## Feature List

### Yellow Phosphor

Collect Yellow Phosphor by mining it near the nether roof!

![Nether Yellow Phosphor Ore in a cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zfeaIriP/images/dbffcf141a6a4af6fc712be2b939f65c85c2c319.png)

### Copper Wire

Craft Copper Wire using 3 copper ingots.

### Glowwood

Use Yellow Phosphor and 4 Oak Logs to craft Glowwood. This wood glows in the dark, making it easy to build a place where no mobs can spawn.

![Glowwood Logs, Planks, and other Glowwood blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zfeaIriP/images/c19d5accd75e0a1b114c2c28aca45869e017bc5e.png)

### OneShot Items

- **The Sun**
  - The Sun can be used as bonemeal.
  - When used on a mob, it gives Regeneration for a short period of time.
- **Silver's Amber**
  - Gives Regeneration II when worn.
- **Calamus's Feather**
  - Gives Speed and Jump Boost when held.
- **George's Die**
  - Place this down for a glowing decoration item!
  - When right-clicked, it gives a random amount of extra health for a random amount of time.

![Silver's Amber, Calamus's Feather, and George's Die on item frames, along with The Sun held by the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zfeaIriP/images/9d0dda0159a5ccd15517493a2bb442bc35f638c9.png)
